execution_policy: Execute in priority order unless threat model identifies a higher-impact workflow.
Treat every task as a hypothesis. Confirm, disprove, dedupe, or mark needs-context.
Do not report unvalidated speculation as a finding.

tasks.objective: Determine whether unauthenticated or weakly authenticated input can reach privileged behavior, session creation, token minting, password reset, or account takeover paths.
tasks.validation_goal: Produce a local request/test demonstrating unauthorized access, invalid token acceptance, session fixation, reset abuse, or prove guards prevent it.
review_steps: Read the scoped file and immediate callers/callees.
Trace attacker-controlled sources to security-sensitive sinks.
List guards/sanitizers and try to disprove the hypothesis.
If plausible, create the smallest safe local reproduction or failing regression test.
Record outcome as confirmed, disproven, duplicate, needs-context, or patched.
evidence_required: source-to-sink path or explicit non-reachability proof
local reproduction, failing test, or deterministic static proof
affected component/version/configuration
minimal remediation path

tasks.objective: Trace whether attacker-controlled user, tenant, role, organization, project, or resource IDs can access or mutate data outside their authority.
tasks.validation_goal: Create a failing authorization regression test with two principals/tenants, or document a deterministic proof that policy checks dominate every sink.
review_steps: Read the scoped file and immediate callers/callees.
Trace attacker-controlled sources to security-sensitive sinks.
List guards/sanitizers and try to disprove the hypothesis.
If plausible, create the smallest safe local reproduction or failing regression test.
Record outcome as confirmed, disproven, duplicate, needs-context, or patched.
evidence_required: source-to-sink path or explicit non-reachability proof
local reproduction, failing test, or deterministic static proof
affected component/version/configuration
minimal remediation path

tasks.objective: Find flows where user-controlled URLs, hosts, webhooks, callbacks, redirects, or metadata endpoints influence outbound network requests.
tasks.validation_goal: Use a local mock endpoint and blocked-address cases to demonstrate request control, or prove allowlist/canonicalization blocks dangerous destinations.
review_steps: Read the scoped file and immediate callers/callees.
Trace attacker-controlled sources to security-sensitive sinks.
List guards/sanitizers and try to disprove the hypothesis.
If plausible, create the smallest safe local reproduction or failing regression test.
Record outcome as confirmed, disproven, duplicate, needs-context, or patched.
evidence_required: source-to-sink path or explicit non-reachability proof
local reproduction, failing test, or deterministic static proof
affected component/version/configuration
minimal remediation path

tasks.attack_class: Path traversal / arbitrary file read or write
tasks.objective: Check whether attacker-controlled file names, archive paths, template names, export names, or import paths can escape intended directories or overwrite sensitive files.
tasks.validation_goal: Build a local fixture for traversal, symlink, archive-slip, or path-normalization bypass; verify expected denial after patch.
review_steps: Read the scoped file and immediate callers/callees.
Trace attacker-controlled sources to security-sensitive sinks.
List guards/sanitizers and try to disprove the hypothesis.
If plausible, create the smallest safe local reproduction or failing regression test.
Record outcome as confirmed, disproven, duplicate, needs-context, or patched.
evidence_required: source-to-sink path or explicit non-reachability proof
local reproduction, failing test, or deterministic static proof
affected component/version/configuration
minimal remediation path

tasks.objective: Trace user-controlled strings into shell/process APIs and verify argument separation, allowlists, environment isolation, and quoting behavior.
tasks.validation_goal: Add a local test proving controlled command/argument injection or proving shell-free invocation and allowlist enforcement.
review_steps: Read the scoped file and immediate callers/callees.
Trace attacker-controlled sources to security-sensitive sinks.
List guards/sanitizers and try to disprove the hypothesis.
If plausible, create the smallest safe local reproduction or failing regression test.
Record outcome as confirmed, disproven, duplicate, needs-context, or patched.

tasks.objective: Map sources of untrusted input through this component to sensitive sinks and security decisions.
tasks.validation_goal: Produce a source-to-sink trace or prove the file is not externally reachable in deployed configurations.
review_steps: Read the scoped file and immediate callers/callees.
Trace attacker-controlled sources to security-sensitive sinks.
List guards/sanitizers and try to disprove the hypothesis.
If plausible, create the smallest safe local reproduction or failing regression test.
Record outcome as confirmed, disproven, duplicate, needs-context, or patched.
evidence_required: source-to-sink path or explicit non-reachability proof
local reproduction, failing test, or deterministic static proof
affected component/version/configuration
minimal remediation path
